channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Law of the jungle — 121 replies — 153.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Law of the jungle

Open thread • Replies: 121 • Updated: 2026-06-14 16:01 UTC

OP

>I am a million billion trillionair-
>BAM BAM BAM
>STAB STAB STAB
W-WHY AM I DYING I AM RICH AND HAVE MONEY ROCKETS CARS AIEEEEEE
P-PLEASE SIRE SAVE M-
>BAM BAM BAM
NOOOO WHY IS MONEY USELESS WHY WHY WHY WAAAAH PLEASE SIR
I WILL GIVE YOU EVERYTHIN-
>STAB HIS KIDS
AAAAAAH MY KIDDIES MY BLOODLINE WHY WHY
PLEASE SIR THE TRILLION MONEY
ACK

Early replies (first 3)

62359354
>>62359336
a mentally buck busted normie is going to say """the law""" grants the rich physical immunity.... and even if it doesn't, they have like, body guards who are omnipotent, omniscient, and omnipresent. you can't do ANYTHING to the rich!!!! it's literally impossible!!!!!

62359360
>>62359336
We live in capitalism and I'm protected by the pigs u need to learn how to move nigga

62359387
>nigger tier envy thread
>/biz/

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62365695
>>62365690
i'm at $153k >>62360783 and i consider myself lower middle class despite living in a MCOL area. the $80k/yr i save and invest is literally nothing. in general, you're poor if you're an employee.

62365698
>>62365695
Meanwhile I'm on 20k eur a year
Fucking Americans

62365702
>>62365698
i'd rather live in a society free of jewish machinations like central banking, capitalism, and shit skin immigration.

62365703
>>62365702
Yep we got all of those + shit wages

62365715
desu I'm a communist for my own interests, the "people"/working class in the current year fucking suck they're all right-wing af and fetishize "hard work" while being exploited its disgusting
I want to puke when I have to consider them my "comrades"

62365719
>>62365715
it's widely believed that lumpen are incapable of achieving class consciousness.

62365722
>>62365719
lumpen are more based than working class at least half the time

62365724
>>62359336
>I am an anon-
>KNOCK KNOCK KNOCK
W-WHY AM I GETTING ARRESTED I JUST MADE LE FUNNY POS-
>OPEN UP
NOOOOOOO IT WAS JUST A JOKE

62365730
>>62365722
Also in this shithole country labor isn't even worth it compared to gibs so I'd rather leech welfare and commit crimes than slave for poverty wages. I'm doing my part demoralizing these pathetic rightoid hard workers. The government pays for everything, gave me a huge house and I break the law almost daily KEK
I have everything my neighbours have

62365739
>>62359336
Yeah, but you won't do shit, though.

>>62359400
>t.never heard of drones

62365752
>>62365730
american lumpen do basically the same thing. american working poor also espouse righttarded views that further enrich their exploiters, retire into poverty, then cry bloody murder when anyone threatens their state funded retirement gibs like medicare/medicaid.

62365755
>>62365752
More like leisure class of the sewers
The only "negative" is that these working poor look down on me, but little do they know

62365772
The only respectable working class are the Marxists. Until the day you dare raise the red banners I'll keep on eating for you
At least I take the time to post agitprop inbetween gooning and smoking meth so you could say I engage in class struggle myself

62365810
>>62359336
The most based thread on /biz/

62365816
>>62365810
Meanwhile I got banned for posting a similar such thread the other day. Mods = fags
But lets keep it up comrades

62365827
>law of the jungle

Do you realize a man with a trillion dollars could hire 100,000 men to torture and rape you to death? lmao

62365831
>>62365827
that doesn't mean anything.

62365833
>>62365827
Yet he'd lose against a single methed out homeless nigger in psychosis
Curious no?

62365844
He will use his AI to imprison and torture you for writing this, jealous tard. You will be harmed by an AI forever.

62365846
>>62365844
is this the new striver cope?

62365866
>>62365659
this guy is either a larper or extremely lost.
>>/r/lgbt/
>>62365724
don't live in the UK

62365875
>>62365866
>4chan is my heckin super sekrit nazi hideout
Stfu faggot I've been here longer than you have
I used to be a capitalist cuck like most of you but something finally snapped recently. And I believe many on /biz/ are ready for a communist revolution having witnessed the capitalist system up close

62365880
>>62365827
The USA couldn't defeat Iran with a trillion dollars military
Russia couldn't defeat Ukraine with thousands of men. Ukraine can't defeat Russia with all the help they got from NATO nations

62366055
>>62365875
>I believe many on /biz/ are ready for a communist revolution
that's why /biz/ shits on communism so much.
>I used to be a capitalist cuck like most of you but something finally snapped recently.
you mean you're not making money and are too broke, in other words, stupid, to live comfortably in the system?
only poors want a redistribution of wealth.
>Stfu faggot I've been here longer than you have
No one cares. This is a crypto board and you're /pol/ posting.

62366077
>>62359336
why are you seething over someone else's wealth? someone that you don't even know? try it and you either end up dead or in prison either way you still lose.

62366107
>>62366055
materially I am personally comfortable though
But I want it all because I'm not a cuck like you

62366123
>>62365833

No he wouldn't. Power has never been individual and has always been about your ability to build organizations and leverage armies of men, dumbfuck. Can't even edgelord right without sounding like a toddler.

62366125
>Create strife and problems
>Create poor people by infiltrating government and taxing everyone to death and beyond
>"Gommunism will save you!"

62366130
>>62365880

We weren't talking about that, we were basing it off of your retarded little "but I could shoot him" hypothetical. If we're talking straight gang laws Elon Musk is still able to conquer entire micronations, much less have to deal with you lmfao.

That's actually one thing that's always vexed me, how cucked and servile billionaires must be to not leverage their astronomic wealth more in violent ways. Because they can afford to disappear anyone they want.

62366171
>>62366123
>Power has never been individua
BANG BANG BANG
>ACK WHY AM I DYING!
>I AM SUPER NEXT LEVEL RICH WITH CONTROL OF MY DADDIES BANKS AND THE COUNTRY
>I HAVE BILLIONS OF DOLLARS AND HUGE ARMIES OF SECURITY AND CARS
>THEY KILLED ME I WANT JUSTICE!
news says he dies of heart attack and case is closed
>NO NO NO THEY KILLED ME IT WASN'T A HEART ATTACK PLEASE
BANG BANG BANG
>AIIEEEEE MY MONEY TAKE IT!
dies

item.title: >me screaming at myself to not buy LINK in 2019 and just buy Bitcoin — 16 replies — 35.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
>me screaming at myself to not buy LINK in 2019 and just buy Bitcoin

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-06-14 16:21 UTC

OP

>me screaming at myself to not buy LINK in 2019 and just buy Bitcoin

Early replies (first 3)

62364690
>>62364657
I bought both and am still in profit on both.

62364700
Unless you bought the absolute peak of LINKBTC in 2019 you performed identically to BTC by holding LINK. Even if you did buy at the 2019 peak you only need the chart to 3x to breakeven which is not a lot all things considered

62364717
>>62364657
imagine if you had invested in yourself instead of a passive shitcoin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62365040
>>62364657
>NOOOOO!!!!
>IT DOESN'T GO UP!!!
>THIS IS THE TOP!!!!
>NO DON'T POST "DIAMOND HANDS LINK MARINES"!
>NO NO NO NO!!!!

62365042
>>62365040
lmao

62365077
>>62364657
what possessed you to buy a bag of shit? did you actually think that the lightning will strike twice, some shitcoin will repeat the exact moon trajectory of early bitcoin?

62365079
>>62364690
>still in profit
that's not a good wording and a big sign to sell. cash in, let it go. you either sell at the bottom or hold long enough to see yourself become a baggie.

62365080
>>62364717
then he wouldn't even have any shitcoins. what the fuck are you gonna invest in yourself even, anon? tendies? you're the genetic refuse bottom feeder.

62365081
>>62364657
At $1000 it won't matter if you bought at $0.1 like the /biz/ OGs or at $50 like the fuddies. Just be patient.

62365086
>>62364657
i could've retired
instead im a jeetlinker

62365208
>>62364657
I consider buying link more of a fetish than an investment. It's like opening the toilet stall doors wide at the gay club, getting completely naked and just full gumming and licking the toilet bowl so anyone knows im absolutely gutter tier and a free fuck. Might doing so get me a lambo soon? Maybe, who the fuck knows. In the meantime I'll keep tongue massaging those shit stains and hidden cum pools with my ass held high in the air.

62365420
>>62365081
you're a deranged cuckold who likes getting raped by Sergey

YOUR SHITCOIN IS TRADING AT $7 NEARLY 9 YEARS AFTER ITS ICO

62365521
>2029
>Chainlink technology is in use by major institutions and Swift
>however, the LINK token itself is not used for gas, as that would make a bunch of anonymous retail investors from 4chan very rich and the bankers aren't too happy about that
>Sergey announces that the LINK token will be sunset, and that the last LINK node go offline on December 31st, 2029

62365712
>>62365521
>linkcucks still coping on /biz/ on December 31st, 2029

62366223
>>62364690
No you aren't.

62366239
>>62365040
Stinkylinky lmao

you paid for those tickets BOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62354814
Oy vey!

SO BULLISH

62355368
So fxcking bullish xrp

62356264
>>62354749

62356332
It’s time to play ball, you could say

62359192
>>62354749
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

62360971
>>62354749
BOOOOOOOOOMMM

62362480
BOOOOOOM!

62362668
KAAAAAA-BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM!!!

>>62354749

62365556
>>62354749
BOOOOOOOOOM

62365767
Ripple must have a strong back from carrying the entire crypto industry…too bad nobody else is worth a shit to help

62365837
XRP cucks are so broken all they can do is type some variation of 'boom' or 'kaboom' whilst sobbing as their life savings ($500) are slowly erased.

62366112
>>62365837
And yet...

62366174
>BOOOM BULLISH
BOOOOOOM BOOOOOM BULLISH
>BOOOM BULLISH
BOOOOOOM BOOOOOM BULLISH
>BOOOM BULLISH
BOOOOOOM BOOOOOM BULLISH
>BOOOM BULLISH
BOOOOOOM BOOOOOM BULLISH
>BOOOM BULLISH
BOOOOOOM BOOOOOM BULLISH
>BOOOM BULLIS

item.title: ETH ETH Txn cost on L1 is $0.004 . Txns at all time high — 16 replies — 13.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
ETH ETH Txn cost on L1 is $0.004 . Txns at all time high

Open thread • Replies: 16 • Updated: 2026-06-14 15:37 UTC

OP

ETH L1 has already scaled drastically. People were complaining that ETH costs are way too high

Now that it's solved, why isn't it reflecting in price? Even after Tom Lee bought close to 5% of the supply, nothing happens to the price

Early replies (first 3)

62363245
Where else in the world can you transact peer to peer without middleman for $0.004 and the transactions are settled within seconds?

62363249
And why the f is BTC with zero use case at $1.2T market cap and ETH so low?
This doesn't make any sense

62363253
>>62363240
Twas never about high fees, it was almost this low for 2 years, even at 5k price. Twas about kinder maxikings and le ethkiller kumar shills fudding it, imagine posting here that vb and ef sold 100k eth in the orev year when lee boat it in the past week alone.... Basterd!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62363262
>>62363245
L2s were a fail, i told it 5 years ago thats not the way, finally the nigger vitaleek admitted it a few months ago. Now we only need a mania and it ll pump another few dollars again, but yet i am buying under 1500 for now.

62363311
>>62363249
BTC is expensive because BTC is expensive. It gets all the attention of crypto because it's the biggest and oldest. Partly the same reason gold is much more valuable than other metals. ETH does the same SoV as BTC (and arguably does it better) but because it gets less attention, it gets less buys. Also Bitcoin doesn't have competing smart contract platforms launching constant smear campaigns against it. Maybe Bcash but that was almost a decade ago.

62364616
>>62363240
>Txns at all time high
Absolutely false lmao
No one is using that shitchain, which is why the fees are so low.
And to answer your question, the reason it's not helping the price of ETH (shitcoin) is because low fees are actually bearish to the price. If you need me to expand on why its bearish, let me know.

62364655
>>62364616
>Absolutely false lmao
Txns are in fact at all time high https://etherscan.io/chart/tx
Don't let me stop you from seething and denying reality though

62364681
>>62364655
>40% down from all time high
>Txns are in fact at all time high
Literally the chart you posted is showing this.
Also why would I be seething? I don't hold any ETH and the entire reason the OP made this thread was because he is the one (and most ETH bagholders) seething about ETH horrible price action. I am a BTC maxi, my investment is several times in the green from many years ago, while ETH bagholders can't say the same... and I'm the one "seething"? lol
I did use to hold some ETH until they changed it to PoS. If you believed the ETH "triple halving" or whatever the cope at the time was, and decided to baghold instead of doing simple research, put 2 and 2 together to realize how bearish the PoS switch was, and now you're married to the ETH bags, it's not my problem.
Don't worry though, literally any worthless shitcoin can pump, even absolute crap like ADA cardano, so maybe you can break even in your ETH investment in a few years if BTC carries the market hard enough lmao
Don't lose hope!

62364691
>>62364681

62364735
Ethereum is worthless. It has no value. It does nothing. What the fuck does a smart contract even mean? Nothing. Tom lee will be shoving a pineapple up his ass in hell

62364741
The best incentive is no incentive

62365306
>>62363240
Because when they solved high tx cost they reduced miner income. If they were able to increase the throughput so much that tx cost went down to $0.004 while miners made more money than before, then it would pump.
TL;DR: It's gonna die.

62365311
>>62364681
>too retarded to understand a chart
>paragraphs of seethe
yep that's a bitcoin maxi alright kek

62365319
>>62363240
>nothing happens to price
Volatility from normie mass retardation ruined the price. If you look at today's price without the 2021 bubble it looks like an incredibly stable uptrend.

62365471
>>62363240
>why isn't it reflecting in price?
high fees were good for the price.
its a gas token, less demand, lower price.

62366091
>>62365471
yeah same problem with ultracheap blockchains like algorand or tezos.

item.title: Internet Computer $ICP ranks #2 in recent developer activity among AI and big-data-focused projects — 4 replies — 12.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Internet Computer $ICP ranks #2 in recent developer activity among AI and big-data-focused projects

Open thread • Replies: 4 • Updated: 2026-06-14 16:29 UTC

OP

You can shit on the price all you want but data doesn’t lie. ICP is undervalued as fuck.

Early replies (first 3)

62366198
>>62366197

62366230
>>62366198
the number of meaningful wallets that hold between 1K-5K
$ICP
(Dolphins) and 5K-10K (Sharks) continues increasing

62366243
>dev activity
literally just looting the coffers of the org

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62366262
>>62366243
Fuck off nigger, ICP is the only real innovative thing in this shit market.

item.title: how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEE… — 31 replies — 89.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEE…

Open thread • Replies: 31 • Updated: 2026-06-14 16:27 UTC

OP

how much money do u need to date women? Also are they ok if u are not ambitious career driven like if i have 10M but NEET would they be fine with it.. probably not i think they want you to be grinding your job 24/7 and making like 400k a year

Early replies (first 3)

62365550
dating is outdated chud, find something else to focus on

62365555
>>62365550
but i want a gf to watch mobis with, to eat some delicious food, cook together maybe and stuff.. I got a bluray player recently and im building up a collection we could do it together if i had a gf

:(

62365557
>>62365540
a good prostitute in euro cuck land will service you starting from 100$ for 30 mins. Anything else is cope

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62365587
>>62365540
Looks × wealth × status ÷ personality - proximity = capability

62365595
>>62365540
My net worth had just crossed over $1 million when I got my first gf in late 2021. I wish I was lying. There were a number of changes I made in my life at that time but it's still highly suss.

62365600
>>62365555
>I got a bluray player
Jesus christ dude save some pussy for the rest of us

62365604
>>62365555
> watch mobis with, to eat some delicious food, cook together maybe and stuff
Good grief boomers doesn’t have this stuff, we just wed and immediately get send into vietnam mission until retire.

62365608
>>62365540
Trying to think about my cheapest dates.

One drink with a jewish girl in a bar in Germany then drove her to her apartment and fucked her all night.

One drink at a bar in Texas with a married middle school teacher then she drove me to my hotel and I invited her up to my room and fucked her 4 times.

A feminist 23 year old insisted on paying her half of everything, which was funny. Then she spent 24 hours in my bed as my fuck toy.

Etc.

Got into fucking married women for a while, they're always in it for the sex and you never have to actually take them on dates.

62365617
>>62365608
bro how hot are u that u can talk to a girl for 10mins and fuck her

wtf

62365621
>>62365555
I don't know how dudes get made like this at the factory.
TBQHWY I don't want to listen to one for even 5 minutes outside of the chase.

They're never interested in the same stuff as us, even they're pickmes who pretend to be so, and I don't enjoy long shaggy dog tales about minor interpersonal drama with all the emotional/situational context.

62365625
>>62365608
this you ?

62365626
>>62365617
I look like this basically. Worse jaw line and hair and skin but in general, the same. Same height.

62365635
>>62365540
You just need to be someone she can follow.
>10mil
>plenty of spare time
>want to cook
You are a catch anon, sooner you realise sooner the girls will. Then they will follow you and touch your pee pee. Money is irrelevant, I hide it because I don't want to be tricked and user.

62365657
>>62365540
>would they be fine with it
Sure. They'll be even happier with half of it.

62365661
>>62365555
Sounds like you want a friend or bro not a gf

62365697
>>62365555
Checked. Women think men are sex addicts, when we just want someone to watch Shrek with on bluray

62365735
>>62365697
>>62365600
damn is it really that bad to wanna watch high quality movies with a gf on bluray?? I have streaming apps but im tired of them since theyre all shit

62365738
>>62365587

- Looks = 1 - 10
- Wealth = 1 - 10
- Status = 1 - 10

- Personality = 1 - 10 (Low personality score = go-with-the-flow, outgoing, fun and risk-taking behavior. High personality score = standoffish, self-isolating, boring and risk-averse behavior.)

- Proximity = 1 - 10 (Low proximity score = living in a dense urban area and working in a high-volume traffic area. High proximity score = living in a rural area and working in a low-volume traffic area.)

- High-Value Male = 50+ Points
- Average Male = 10 - 25 Points
- Low-Value Male = 0 - 9 Points
- Incel = < 0 Points

62365748
>>62365540
Women want a 9+ handsome face, ripped bod and big dick. Money is cope.

62365871
>>62365540
>>62365555
You answered your own question. It's not about a specific threshold of money it's the perception you're working hard for HER specifically.

genuinely nice girls exist, but are extremely rare. if you want to NEET with someone for eternity unironically date an r9k foid

62365882
>>62365540
The biggest complaints from women are men who are mean, slobs and irresponsible. So if you have a bunch of money and want to NEET, it shouldn’t be that hard to sweep a fellow nerdy girl off her feet. Be affectionate, have a clean space, and don’t blow off things like a date night or blow through all your money lol
The girls who want grindset dudes are most likely to divorce rape you.

62365897
>>62365871
I think the problem is that nice girls are the hardest to find and not even that rare. I know several that still live at home to take care of their parents/family, and have at-home hobbies like knitting/crafting.
When the fuck would you meet any of them?? Especially if they work from home or a female dominated field like childcare.
My best advice will always be to make friends with people and then ask if they know any single women that would be a good match for you. You have to have the ability to show people you’re a good friend that wouldn’t fuck yup their friendship with the girl though

62365953
>>62365882
>mean, slobs, irresponsible
These are the complaints women have about the men they continue to date. So the stuff that is annoying but not a dealbreaker.

62365958
>>62365882
yet somehow that is the type they are attracted to and want to have kids with

62365989
>>62365540
>6’5’’
>8 inch sick with 6 inch girth
>230lbs lean and cut muscle but you can’t be a workout freak you need to have the muscle naturally without doing much exercise all the time
>Perfect hairline, as good as a teenagers
>square jaw line
>wide shoulders
>deep voice
>be naturally extroverted and charismatic
>have many high status friends
>have many ex girl friends so you pass women’s pre-selection requirement
>have 10 million dollars but also have a high status job like a brain surgeon or fighter jet pilot so she can brag to her friends what you do for a living
>be able to speak 3 different languages so you can make her wet when your at the high end French restaurant and talk to the waiter in French and order a high end wine bottle
>have a dark and mysterious secret about yourself to keep her intrigued and excited (maybe you are the world’s best assassin, maybe you are an associate of a multi-billion dollar drug operation as a high ranking middleman, or you are a genius and secretly working on a project to save the energy crisis. Something that is cool and will make her wet when she finds out


This is what you need to get a 5/10 or higher in the year of 2020+6

62366005
>>62365587
>>62365738
Do the math OP.

62366027
>>62365989
>have all this
>become her bf
>she cheats on you with a nigga that has NOTHING of this

62366041
>>62365608
Animal should be allowed to just breed and leave, there is nothing like third parties in the interaction.

62366052
>>62365557
>dude just get herpes with a romanian gypsy in a shitty hotel in the suburbs

kys

62366054
>Women or leveraged, margined silver miners?
Mmmmm...... you're gonna have to get back to me on that bro

62366257
>>62365587
>>62365738
>>62366005
^ This system is outdated, but I've invented a new one. The equation is identical, but the compounding effects of the numerator have been upscaled, personality remains the same. Proximity now has a negative and positive value.

item.title: The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants. — 63 replies — 54.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants.

Open thread • Replies: 63 • Updated: 2026-06-14 15:39 UTC

OP

The person who owns this isn't "on vacation." He does whatever he wants whenever he wants. He's upper class. And has 3 passports and owns properties and businesses (wealth) around the world. He isn't waiting on a paycheck to drive down to Costco.
Hint: it's a Rothschild property.
Making even a million bucks a year writing code for Elon or Bezos or Brin does NOT put you in the upper class. At all.
I am European and only we have class. We invented class.

Early replies (first 3)

62356062
>>62356048
Before AI, you could write code for ten years and then buy this.

62356086
Got so mad in the other thread you thought you would start a new thread about it LMAO

62356191
this is that same polish guy who was seething in the other thread about class or whatever

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62360102
>>62360058
why is a 24 year old mulatto born again christian zoomer trying to give me life advice?

62360116
>>62359522
you have free will to do what you want. But be warned that you lash out at the unblemished Lamb of God. The Alpha and the Omega who healed every infirmity and cast out demons from the land. The Good Shepherd who has defeated and and is Seated at the right hand of Power. The sad thing about people like you is that you are so fallen and your nature is so corrupt that you cannot even hear the Truth if it was read to you. Even the demons themselves that Jesus drove out of people KNEW that he was the Son of the Most High. Repent brother. The Kingdom of Heaven is at hand. We know not the day nor the hour of His return

62360814
>>62359005
>these death monuments will be renouned and respected and not some dinky little tourist hotsp-ACK

62361163
>>62357608
Why do people hate on these posts instead of try to figure out ways to improve their quality of life to have similar?

That's the whole point of this board. Instead of hating on people showing off their wealth figure out how to get it too.

I thought it was only like this on hip hop forums. Everyone hat s on each other and then refuse all ways of getting to it.

62361183
>>62359210
Or stop all or nothing thinking and find a way to live well so you can have wealth and not have to compromise yourself in any way?

62362527
>>62356048
Why would I want such a monstrosity.

62362541
>>62360116
>unfathomably based life speaking minister of /biz
I will miss you when the tranny kike mods ban you for speaking truth, but I know you will bear your cross with dignity.

62362654
>>62356048
why would you even want this? what are you going to use it for? throw parties 24/7 for people you fucking hate? If you live their 24/7 the nice view and garden just become mundane like everything else only now you have a lot less money

62362675
>>62362527
You’re not European, you would not get it.

62362885
>>62358695
>stay poor and let the Jews control wealth and power like a good goy

62363916
>>62356048
everyone there is a pedophile and you'd be asked to leave if you said nigger or faggot. pass.

62363922
>>62356062
Is becoming an expert in AI still a way to make money at all?

62364033
>>62362527
Nothing that a lick of paint, some landscaping and interior decorating couldn't fix. Location, location, location.

62364034
>>62356048
looks boring and not very comfy

62364139
>>62359212
Perhaps we are in hell.

62364148
>>62356048
>We invented class.
But you're not in it.

62364174
>>62356048
That’s nice buddy

62364781
>>62356048
Yeah and when the chips were on the ground and it came to violence the European elite were pretty much powerless to stop the germans twice.

Rich and WEAK.

meanwhile it was the poor, but self sustainable and smart North American freemen that had to save you TWICE.

Stop idolizing the rich and upper class. They are garbage retards, their only contribution is capital, but is capital really just ones and zeros on a hard drive, is that really what drives the will and spirit of a nation? The rich are retards.

62364790
Have you seen the movie with valkyrie niw thats a hot woman. Those other women no I have some morals im not fucking no one. Lol

62364797
>>62356048
I am the CEO of a very major circumcision equipment company and I endorse this message.

62364997
>>62357456
Bet he watches MTV's cribs all day. And thinks posh tacky is better than burger punk tacky. Lots of rich people do not live beyond their means to show off. It can even be hard to tell they are rich. It is the obscenely old money rich and new money niggers who have those villas. Or giant ye-haw ranch style estates you find distasteful.

62365139
>>62358413
What store do you run?

62365155
>>62356048
Rothchilds don’t have a dollar amount worth like we think, the Rothchilds simply have infinite power to do as they want, the entire world’s economic output is in their hands and they have the connections with every elite of whom have connections with all the powerful people to get anything done they desire. They just can’t do extreme projects where they have like a million slaves to build them a mansion on the moon, without causing a goyim uprising, that’s the endgame of the Jews, to have the ability to truly freely do anything they want with zero resistance.

62365166
Europeans also cucked nobility with the Hanseatic League and private banking families.

62365170
>>62363922
Ai needs arms and legs

62365198
>>62365155
Goyim are annoying.

62365372
>>62358695
With they way you are talking you are lukewarm, you should repent.

>Muh Jesus Christ but I curse and talk hatered.
You should act good first other wise your believe in Jesus Christ are fake and Worth nothing. Acting from love = Jesus Christ. Meanwhile you posted hatred and curses.

62365921
>>62358695

> There is neither Jew nor Greek, slave nor free, male nor female, for you are all one in Christ Jesus.
> You worship what you do not know; we worship what we do know, for salvation is from the Jews.

62365927
>>62365139

62366101

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-06-14 15:23 UTC

OP

Anon, someone oneshotted a Runescape-quality MMO with Claude. If you're not able to get filthy rich with this tech, you are just a brainless clown.

https://worldofclaudecraft.com/

Early replies (first 3)

62362742
oldschool runescape is free

62362747
looks like shit
>If you're not able to get filthy rich with this tech, you are just a brainless clown.
sure if you can scam some subhumans but you're competing with 1 billion jeet scammers

62362749
>>62362737
Buy
An
Ad
!

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62363626
>>62363619
Check your metamask, thanks for all your tokens anon

62363634
None of this shit i even necessary. Mangos effectively opensourced every version of wow that doesnt suck already.

62363642
>>62363634
I don't think thats the point

62363653
>>62362737
>>62362737
>If you're not able to get filthy rich with this tech, you are just a brainless clown.
How much money did you make anon? Post gains.

62363987
>>62363619
I played it for 9 hours, reached max lvl and completed all quests. WTF do I do now?

62364002
>>62362742
So the Jannies can afford it. Very kind of them.

62364043
>>62363623
Yeah but being able to spam "nigger" is pretty old school, most modern games would fine a way to permaban you for that

62364090
>>62363642
it is the point, these retarded scriptkiddies think it's amazing to pay anthropic to shit out something worse then something already available for free. all claude can do is copy open source code

62364293
>>62364090
Claude can do so much more than you think. get good at prompting

62364348
>>62364090
When are you retards going to learn? LLMs learn in almost the same way humans do. They understand things conceptually.

62364357
People with balls played this MMO

62364390
>>62363118
it's not automatic, there's literally a mod that goes through the chat logs and bans anyone who says nigger

62364391
>>62362753
So you get to be a funko pop?

62364400
sounds gay

62364408
>>62364390

62364447
>>62362737
IMAGINE OSRS 2.0 holy

62364461
>>62362843
>>62362844
it's so over for snailcat retards

62364719
>>62362737
impressive but 7 fps isn't going to work.

62364883
>>62364719
>7FPS isn't going to work
I bet you dont have hardware acceleration on dumbie

62364978
>>62363623
the assets are free open source models and stuff so it looks like shit

The gameplay is a classic wow clone, it's shockingly similar

62365021
>>62364090
Thanks...these dumbfucks thinks it cool they reskinned something and made it gay

62365211
>>62362737
>oneshotted
100% guarantee it wasn't actually "oneshotted". Also Fable 5 got banned already, even if you could one shot, it's over now.

62365245
>>62362737
this is trash

62365483
>>62362737
Dune banned AI for a reason.

62365496
>>62365211

62365514
https://github.com/levy-street/world-of-claudecraft/blob/main/src/game/interactions.ts

it's claude code alright

62365881
>>62362737

so it's utter unplayable dogshit?
wow AI is the future

62365955
>>62362737
>>62362753
>>62363118

62365991
>>62362737

It's only impressive to people who understand nothing about game development. But it's interesting that OP hired spam bots for promotion. Is he somehow making money off of it?

62366047
>>62362742
>>62363625
in the shitty art style
also runescape is ultrashit skinner box

item.title: No regrets selling BTC?? — 97 replies — 15.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
No regrets selling BTC??

Open thread • Replies: 97 • Updated: 2026-06-14 10:31 UTC

OP

Some talk about regretting it.

Anyone sold and still thinks it was the right move?

If you had the cash from that sale sitting in your account today, would you buy BTC again? Because I definitely would.

Early replies (first 3)

62339349
I sold my last bitcoin last year. Shitcoin is dead. AI is dead. Time to start acting like an african american.

62339372
>>62339349
Maybe regrets for buying? Should have bought chainlink

62339382
I rotated into XMR at like $105k, no regrets at all.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62354820
>>62351106
I've actually earned more from memecoins than utility coins lately lol.

62354827
>>62339328
Anyone bullish on avalanche?

62355050
>>62339328
I sold when the Epstein files dropped. Feels good.

62355133
>>62354803
That’s the part a lot of people overlook. If TBVs actually work as intended, I think people are underestimating how much TVL native BTC use cases could pull in.

62355136
>>62355050
Time will tell whether it was the right call, but at least you acted according to your move.

62355617
>>62355133
It's crazy that DeFi security is still one of the biggest problems in the space.

62355631
>>62354827
Buy avax today and sell @ $100

62355632
>>62339417
Monero programmers, like the telegram founder, can be compromised
And monero is based on bitcoin. The entire crypto market exists because of all the money in bitcoin which is now backed by the US government.

62356269
>>62355617
At this point, thorough audits and multiple layers of review should be the standard, not a nice bonus anon.

62356538
>>62355631
What's your basis?

62357046
>>62345600
Probably the better route. We've seen too many centralized services blow up over the years, so you can't really blame people for preferring fully decentralized setups.

62357057
>>62355632
What about ZEC?

62357077
ICP

62357115
>>62339328
I sold at 116k I dont regret it at all and have about 2 mil waiting for sept-dec buy in.

62357126
>>62339328
I can never regret buying BTC desu, I bought back in around 70K and will DCA more if price goes below 60K. I'm also staking a little BTC on babylon for some extra yield

62357923
>>62355632
>Monero programmers, like the telegram founder, can be compromised
yeah just like the bitcoin developers right? they're the ones who control bitcoin?

it's a good question though, what if they were? miners would have to agree on consensus on which code to accept. if github ever refused to host monero's code then it would just move to .onion or .i2p

62359525
>>62357046
That's how it goes. They've already got GoMining, Ledger, and a16z involved, so let's see who they bring in next.

62359541
>>62357057
ZEC is interesting. If the privacy narrative picks up again, it's usually one of the first names people bring up.

62359557
>>62339328
I literally don't care about it. Mogged by virtually everything else over the last couple of years.

Also why is faggot shit like dogecoin still worth billions of dollars.

>in b4 bottom signal
Probably.

62359588
>>62357126
Sounds like you've got a plan and you're sticking to it. Hard to ask for much more than that. I wouldn't be surprised if more people follow suit over time. The $4B+ TVL shows there's already plenty of interest.

62359608
>>62359557
The market has a weird habit of rewarding the things nobody can rationally explain.

62359673
>>62357077
People still remember the launch, but the tech discussion around ICP is often more interesting than the price chart.

62360479
>>62359557
When bottom

62361782
>>62360479
Nobody knows

62362657
>>62359557
How do you mean?

62362661
>>62339328
While BTC is in deep bear stage, it's time to get in. I need to be greedy when others are fear.

62363445
>>62362657
It's his opinion

62364599
>>62339349
>Time to start acting like an african american.
finally someone said it

62365449
>>62362661
You're just doing the right thing..

62365460
any time you can cash out, turn a profit and not get anally blasted by exchanges is a good time to cash out.

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-06-14 14:21 UTC

OP

Early replies (first 3)

62364003

Ok? Weird thing to post on social media but you do you I guess

62364012
>infertile hag with a pro abortion profile picture fudding SPCX
bullish

62364017
Imagine working for 40 years across the 4 biggest bullruns ever and not even managing to get a penny to your name. Normies deserve it

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62364022
>>62363943
I hate Elon Musk because he is African.

62364031
>>62363943
>I spent the last 37 years of my working life consooming instead of saving my money
>this is why we need socialism
I fucking hate poor people. They're all a bunch of stupid, lazy, greedy faggots.

62364132
My father always told me that if you reach your 40s without a property you have done some something wrong with your life.

62364142
>>62364132
What if you get a property and your ex takes it away from you?

62364173
>>62364142
The secret is to rent out your property and live in another rented place. Crisis avoided.

62364228
>>62364017
This. Fucking loser had two REALLY GOOD opportunities to slurp up a cheap house, with dirt cheap interest rates sustained for a decade. He will get zero fucking sympathy from me. Hope he works door dash until he's 90 years old. This is the kind of person who says "why save, you may die tomorrow!"

62364254
>>62364228
>>62364132
t.
house was paid for by your parents

62364267
>>62364254
Nah. I am a "financial mutant" that can live happily on an extremely small amount and I invested/saved like 60% of my income for like 7 years to get plenty to put down on a house. I did the house hacking thing where I have 3 roommates pay my mortgage for me, that way I can put like 80% of my income into retirement now.

I will admit my mom gave me her old car. It's ugly as sin, but super reliable, so there's that I guess. If I grew up in the boomer economy or started saving money before 2008 house crash, I'd be retired at 40 most likely.

62364275
>>62364267
if you spent 7 years of blood sweat and tears for a down payment, and then more years of the same working down the debt
how can you not have any sympathy for someone under 40 that doesn't outright own a house?

it's not easy to pay off a mortgage before you're 40.

62364291
>>62364275
I try to have sympathy and rationalize "not everyone is as financially responisble as me" but some of these fucking losers still have no excuse.

There's a huge difference between 40 and 52. I would never judge someone who didn't have a house paid off by 40, if it's a 30 year mortgage then theyd have to start paying at 10. Even at 52, I could easily understand not having the mortgage fully paid off, but for a 52 year old to say they aren't even making headway on equity? It's either someone who spent their whole life making bad decissions, or someone so unmotivated they thought they could coast through on life working at mcdonalds.

62364306
>>62364291
I don't know many 50 year olds. I'm in my early 30s. Everybody in my generation is either underwater on a mortgage, renting, or their house was paid for by their parents.

62364314
>>62364306
I highly recommend trying to budgetmaxx like I did. I guess I'm lucky because I can be happy with very little and most expensive things that people desire I don't care much about.

But if you live this lifestyle for even 6 months, you can save some money to put towards debt, and maybe you'll realize you actually don't need those subscriptions or unlimited cell phone data to be happy.

Most young people should probably get roommates. Most young people nowadays I talk to act like it is their divine right to have their own living space, and having a roommate is third world behavior when it can literally cut your living expenses in half. Just do it for like 5 years to get the home downpayment at least.

If you do all of this, and you still can't make financial headway, then you simply MUST get a better job. I spent like 12 months where I almost had no days off because I spent 5 days a week at school/clinicals and 2 days a week working, but now I have a pretty good paying job. If you have a shit paying job and don't do anything to improve it, you're going to wish you sucked up the 1 difficult year instead of 60 years of never having a break from the minimum wage job

62364358
Can't wait for quadrillionaires and zillionaires

62364362
So much seethe over it haha

You can tell it’s a mad white woman over the profile pic too

62364370
>>62363943
Holy Christ can any of you answer the fucking question without sperging out about the fucking screncap?

62364498
>>62363943
Women aren't supposed to own homes thoughbeit

62364504
>>62363943
I hate poor people.

What a loser pos 52 year old.

62364505
Totally worthless loser is a loser and pays no taxes.

62364510
>>62364142
This happened to me. We weren't married but we lived together for several years. When we sit up, she filed for de facto divorce and got the house I paid for. Ironically I still have to pay the mortgage by law even though she's got way more wealth than me now.

62364533
It's become existential and soon mainstream to want to repeal women's voting rights

62364562
>>62364510
And you don’t do anything lol

62365539
>>62363943
I wonder if xe also enjoys Marxism and has multiple fatherless brown offspring.

62365541
>>62364510
Why haven't you killed her yet?

62365605
>>62364358

62365836
>>62364370
OP fell victim to one of the classic blunders; never let your image be more interesting than your post.

62365874
>>62363943
>I did not buy $100 worth of literally any mega cap stock for the past 37 years
>I'm stupid and penniless
>I'm assblasted wealthy people exist

$100 invested in MSFT every month over the span of this retards 37 year working life be be worth $4.5 mil minimum. What a loser faggot.

item.title: What if ETH actually doesn't recover though — 12 replies — 11.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
What if ETH actually doesn't recover though

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-06-14 15:47 UTC

OP

What if ETH actually doesn't recover though

Early replies (first 3)

62365840
>>62365835
>if

62365842
>>62365835
I ll never touch crypto anymore(wont happen, he must bait us)

62365850
All they have to do is figure out how to upgrade its speed to compete with basedlana and telegram's blockchain but noooo vitalik wants to write science fiction books now.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62365852
>>62365835
bitcoin maximalists were right

62365855
>>62365850
unfortunately, to achieve fast finality they would have to cap the validator set

62365892
>>62365855
Yes, its decenrralized.

62365899
The best incentive is no incentive…incentivized blockchains will not make it long term

62365925
>>62365850
Speed has very little to do with the current situation

62366074
What does crypto have going for it atm? Banking on the whole 'cycle' narrative is retarded and feels scammy to say the least. The market is too volatile and openly manipulated. They aren't even trying to hide it anymore. Is the crypto space cooked for real or what?

62366099
>>62366074
Tokenization of real world assets is what I’m excited about….but I’m a land owner

62366122
>>62365835
Don't worry, the Clarity Act will be the wave that lifts all ships! Hang tight!

62366127
>>62366099
I'm a bit of a retard, but what does that mean? I saw people mentioning RWAs for years now and I never thought much of it. It seems like it still hasn't taken off yet?

item.title: I got a 20% raise yesterday. $120 --> $144k (plus $7k-$10k annual bonuses). I also just paid off my car which frees up $… — 42 replies — 11.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
I got a 20% raise yesterday. $120 --> $144k (plus $7k-$10k annual bonuses). I also just paid off my car which frees up $…

Open thread • Replies: 42 • Updated: 2026-06-14 13:03 UTC

OP

I got a 20% raise yesterday. $120 --> $144k (plus $7k-$10k annual bonuses). I also just paid off my car which frees up $500/month. What should I do with the extra income?

Right now I basically break even when factoring in mortgage, gas/food, insurance, preschool costs, and 5% contribution to retirement (with employer match). I live in a moderately HCOL area, for context. I'm looking at an extra $1800 now per month post-tax. I'm thinking of increasing retirement contributions, put a couple hundred extra a month toward mortgage principal (5.625% interest rate), putting a little into kids college funds, and saving up what remains in HYSA for emergencies and home projects. Anything else I'm missing?

Early replies (first 3)

62363658
not your personal blog, faggot

62363663
go back you wagie normie niggerfaggot

62363668
Grats. Pay min on mortgage, no extra. Put extra into roth ira until maxed. Rest into roth 401k if available.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62363815
>>62363770
>just send $5k+/month to full-time daycare
The preschool is part-time for my older son's benefit; not a childcare center.

62364055
>>62363657
>5% contribution to retirement
that's pretty low (even with employer match), but I wouldn't put any more into the 401k. Plunk the rest of your free cash into a Roth IRA at your favorite brokerage firm (I like Schwab because it's also a FDIC bank, but Vanguard and Fidelity are also fine).

62364061
>>62363657
>Right now I basically break even
i hope your bitch is working.

62364072
>>62363745
>you can make much more especially with compounding
1965-1982 and 2000-2012 say "hi". Paying off the mortgage is a guaranteed win. Playing the market is only a win as long as line goes up.

62364118
Roth IRA 50/50 SCHD and VT

62364143
>>62363657
If you don't have an emergency fund, prioritize that. 3-6 months, but I'd aim closer to 6 with kids. Also, what a lot of people don't consider is building additional dedicated savings funds for known irregular expenses. (For example, you know you will eventually need a new roof, so start putting a little away every month now instead of needing to take out a loan in the future) You could save for a new car, computer, mattress, air conditioning unit, etc. this way. Think of expensive things you own that will eventually need to be replaced and start saving a little each month now for them so that down the line you aren't having to pay some interest to some jew to borrow his money in a lump sum.

The rest of your plan sounds good. Congrats on the raise!

62364145
>>62363674
Can you recast your mortgage? Given that your mortgage interest is greater than the risk-free rate, that would be a reasonable move. But otherwise, you should never put more into your mortgage payments than necessary because it affords you no benefit. If nothing else, you could just save the extra money in an emergency fund, to pay the mortgage in a later month if you lose your source of income.

62364224
>>62364061
The cost of daycare for two kids would basically be $60k/year where we live so there's no point in her working. We were also moving around a lot the last four years to get to my current long-term career so she didn't exactly have the opportunity to career build. She will be working once the younger one is in kindergarten.
>>62364055
Is the idea that it's good to diversify between pre-tax and post-tax contributions?
>>62364143
Yea , you get it. It's why I can't fully commit to retirement funds. We need a new driveway in the next couple years, for instance. This raise makes it possible. The bugger question is what's the ideal breakdown for allocation.
>>62364145
We actually financed from 6.99% to 5.625% back in...April I think? With no points. Literally the day before Trump starting bombing Iran. Mortgage payment was supposed to go down $300/month but property taxes were raised so it only went down $200...

62364230
>>62363657
But do you have seven figures? If not, you're still lower class according to /biz/

62364245
>>62364224
>it's good to diversify between pre-tax and post-tax contributions
Yes. Withdrawing from pre-tax accounts counts as income, and you pay income tax on it. But that income also affects things like medicare payments and so forth, so you want the ability to control how much of your retirement money is income and how much is tax free (Roth). It's also good to diversify between retirement and non-retirement accounts, so set up a regular brokerage account and contribute to it as well, you'll pay capital gains taxes but those are much lower than income taxes (0% up to $98k/yr if you're married filing jointly), and that also doesn't count as income. That'll give you something you can tap into if you or your wife need to retire early, e.g. to take care of a parent or something.

62364248
>>62364224
man you have two kids while being a wagie and having a mortgage?

no one in your entire family tree could give you enough money to be free?

and you think you were good enough to reproduce?

62364257
>>62364224
>what's the ideal breakdown for allocation.
There is no universal ideal, that's something that is specific to your situation. I've got about 60% of my money in pre-tax retirement accounts and I wish it were much lower. Unfortunately I've been ineligible to contribute to a Roth for most of my career, so the other 40% is in a couple of brokerage accounts that I'll have to pay capital gains taxes to access. If I were to do it again I'd only contribute enough to my 401k to get the employer match, then put the rest into an S&P 500 index fund in a brokerage account. If you can contribute to a Roth, then I'd split my non-401k contributions evenly between the Roth and brokerage funds. The 0% tax on Roth accounts is no joke, but not being able to tap into them until you're 59 1/5 is also no joke, meanwhile the relatively low capital gains tax rate takes a lot of the sting out of the brokerage accounts.

62364265
>>62364248
lol
spoilt brat faggot
you'd be penniless if you weren't carried by your parent's money

62364271
>>62364265
>family is on this planet since 2500 B.C
>still does not own a home

Yikes

62364274
>>62364245
And for the regular brokerage account, I take I should tie the money to something like S&P? The only reason I've shied away from that is in my college years I was one if those shitheads addicted to "active investment" and fear I'll blow thousands of dollars again if I open a new account.
>>62364248
>wage
I make $144k/year and work essentially my own hours with no boss. I have to be at work approx. 5 hours/week in the fall and spring (I'll let you guess my job) but that's it. So technically I'm a wagie but I never feel like it. Never have to ask time off for anything.
>>62364257
What happens if I tap before 59.5? Percent penalty? I used to have money in i-series bonds and it sucked not bring able to touch them for however long the maturity date was.

62364288
>>62364271
you have no valuable advice to offer anyone. you live in a sheltered bubble

62364289
>>62364271
OP here, yea, my family is full of financially retarded people. My dad proudly jokes that his Native American name is "Spends With Fury." And because my parents being broke led to me getting a full tuition "scholarship" to college, he feels totally justified in his actions. He tells me he plans to spend every cent of his money before he dies.

I'm doing my best to set my kids up better but inflation and rising housing costs didn't help. I have a buddy whose grandparents and parents set him up nicely. He bought a $3 million home in DC recently, all cash, is spending $750k on renovations, and doesn't even work. Must be nice. I've made my own life nearly as nice as circumstances could have allowed.

62364313
>>62364224
Here's what I would do:
>Emergency fund first, get it to 3 months asap since you have other big known expenses coming up. After that, maybe throw $100 or $200 a month into it to keep it growing while you're doing other things with your money. I really think with kids the ultimate goal should be 6 months.
>You're supposed to have roughly 1x your salary saved for retirement by 30, which you do. What I would do is increase your 401k contributions by 1% annually to make sure you keep on track until you get to about 10%. So bump it up to 6% after this raise. Open a roth IRA if you don't have an IRA already and max that out. Max out an HSA if you have one.
>Put a couple hundred into your kids' college funds
>Look at prices for new driveways in your area and start putting away monthly to pay for it. You could probably push the replacement out a few years if you need to. I mean, it's just a bunch of concrete you drive on top of, it's doesn't have to be pristine. It's not an emergency if it's got a bunch of cracks in it.
>Then increase mortgage payments

Also, look for ways to save money. $144k/year after taxes should leave you about $100k. Subtracting mortgage and the $1800/month you have freed up means you're spending roughly $3300/month on non-mortgage expenses. I'm not saying you need to eat beans for every meal or skip vacations or stop enjoying your hobbies, but take a look at the stuff you buy and think about if you really need to be spending money on that. If you do, fine, but it's worth a look to see if you can free up extra money.
You'll probably be getting more pay raises and your wife will start working in the future too so even if you feel stretched thin now, don't stress about it, you're on the right track and things will get easier.

>I should tie the money to something like S&P?
Yeah, that or total stock market, total world stock market. Any broad index fund you like and then don't touch it.

62364320
>>62364315
are you seriously coping about being a trust fund kid so hard you have memes saved to your computer to use when people point this out online

62364419
>>62364289
Have you considered aggressively investing in shitcoins?

62364493
>>62364419
Unironically the only reason I own my house is Bitcoin. Beginning in 2022 I started DCAing Bitcoin and sold in December 2024 for a $30k gain. Managed to have just enough for a 20% down payment for my house.
>>62364313
Yes I could be tighter with money. With dependent care and retirement and taxes all taken out of my paycheck, my estimated monthly take home with the raise is $8,050. Minus mortgage and the $1,800 extra, I'm at $3,067.

Let's say $500/month for utilities (sometimes more), $75/month for phone plan, $500/month for groceries, $200/month for gas, $300/month on medical expenses (wife is Type 1), $100/month on car insurance, and $200/month toward old medical debt.

That leaves about $1,200/month extra. Some of that goes toward smaller projects (like I had to get a tree guy to get fungus off our front yard tree). But I know we also probably spend too much on eating out (probably a few hundred a month) and other odds and ends.

62364668
>>62364257
Why didnt you backdoor roth? Also roth conversions can be accessed after 5 years and there are 72t sepps to access money penalty free before 59.5. Maybe hold off on giving advice unless you k ow what youre talking about, but you are on the right track in realizing too much pretax becomes an issue. 500k/person youre supporting is where you might start to get in trouble if you dont begin to draw down soon and dont have deduction tricks up your sleeve.

62364705
>>62364668
Also roth contributions are accessible anytime penalty free. As far as brokerages go, a married couple gets almost 100k tax free in qualified dividends or ltcgs, roc isnt taxed at all, and you can gain harvest. Im not evwn going to begin to get into deduction hacks. All yall need some education.

62364709
>>62364705
**tax free if there is no other income exceeding deductions

62364805
>>62364274
>my wife can't work because I work so much
>I have to be at work approx. 5 hours/week
So which is it?

62364813
>>62364805
Are you retarded? When did I say my wife can't work because I work so much?

62364824
>>62364813
When you said childcare is $60k/yr if she got a job. Why tf can't she work if you're home all the time? Do you hate your children? So you have to stay far away from them despite not working?

Whole thread being a LARP confirmed.

62364851
>>62364824
If you need it spelled out, I work in academia. My "required" time in office is teaching. But I also still research and write scholarly pieces. But I enjoy doing that and get to write about whatever I want so it doesn't feel like work. But I cannot write and also raise kids full time. I wasn't trying to imply that I literally only work 5 hours a week.

62365713
>>62364668
>Why didnt you backdoor roth?
The same factors that make me ineligible to contribute to a roth also makes roth conversions uneconomical.

item.title: Why's he a trillionaire when his companies barely make money? — 92 replies — 9.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why's he a trillionaire when his companies barely make money?

Open thread • Replies: 92 • Updated: 2026-06-14 07:24 UTC

OP

>Tesla makes $3.9B/year, and the amount goes down year after year, yet has a 1.5T market cap
>SpaceX literally loses money and its claim to future profit is Grok, a cash-burning AI model that is losing to GPT and Claude
>Twitter is breakeven at best
What's going on here? Are white boomers just throwing money at him because they don't like seeing Indians, Chinese and Jews running shit in tech? This is the only explanation for the Elon Musk phenomenon I can make any sense of.

Early replies (first 3)

62361459
>>62361452
People rightly see him as a visionary for the future of humanity with the ability to actually do the stuf he foresees.

on the negative side much of what he envisions is distopian

and the first person to pioneer a technology is often NOT the person who gets rich off it

but you have to start somewhere, and he certainly does stuff other companies can't.

62361461
companies do not have to be profitable for people to speculate on them performing well in the future, and it helps when everyone said every company would go to zero but instead became some of the most valuable assets by marketcap in the world because they provided goods and services people wanted

62361471
>>62361459
>rightly
He hasn't even done anything, period.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62363614
>>62361452
>all ''muh equity' meme, actually has nothing
Nearly all of the modern, popular billionaire class isn't even rich. Augustus or Mansa Musa mog.

62363633
>>62363442
They are a real thing. But they are not premium batteries for cars because of their rather low energy density. Much better suited for energy storage where you don't care about space or weigh that much if the specs are otherwise good.

62363679
>>62362689
>Like many of us, I don't like his liberalism or his transhumanism
...what? When people talk about musk being liberal or a transhumanist isn't the first thing that comes to mind

62363689
>>62363679
Maybe it should be

62364188
>>62362689
i wish neuralink were public id invest the shit out of that high key

62364215
>>62362689
After Elon replied "you have said the whole truth" to a post on twatter that was basically "jews are racist towards white people" it was like a switch was flipped. They drug him to israel to make him look at a babby crib from the mossad oct 7 false flag attack and see their gay wall. The US media jews went full Elon bad and the jews sent their deranged libtards golems after Teslas in the streets. It was a sight be behold. The Elon plate carrier is up there with the Jeb Bush hoodie moment.

62364243
>>62361452
Because him are genius businessman.

62364247
>>62361452
Idk but what he did with twitter is up there with the all time great American shit.

62364330
>>62361452
Hypeman incarnated.

62364434
>>62364215
Sometimes I forget how retarded people on this board can be. Thanks for the reminder

62364440
>>62364434
It's genuinely fucked how antisemitic this board can be. Why Mossad hasn't gotten it shut down and its posters dragged through legal coals is fucking mystifying to me.

62364443
>>62364188
Yeah people don't seem to get that the whole point of the company is to offer a form of immortality down the road, by creating neural-digital interfacing that can bridge consciousness between brain and computer. Neuralink can and will charge any amount they want for that kind of tech, once it matures. They could price it at ten billion 2026 dollars per person and they would have a years or even decades-long waitlist.

62364868
>>62364443
yeah anon when moon

62364886
>>62361471
keep seething commie

62364900
>>62363679
Most people talking about him are dogshit retarded

62364907
SpaceX is being destroyed because Elon has to pay off billions of debt for his AI shit and Twitter purchase. The easiest way to do this without destroying Tesla was to merge them all together and IPO them. They're going to sell their stock after Blackrock and Vanguard dump the boomer 401k money buying them

62364918
>>62361478
He threw a pretty good fastball that one time. It made more progress than the vehicle did thoughbeit.

62365050
>>62361452
because stocks don't behave rationally and memes move the market more strongly than financial schizobabble

62365078
>>62361452
you can become one too, just create a crypto coin, mint 1T tokens and sell 1 for $1 on the open markets

62365099
>>62361452
heres the thing. it was all vaporware the whole time...tesla included. it just wasnt as brazen as the ipo before...worse with every scam. so he could keep borrowing. because hes doing "buy borrow die", it became the banks problem at this point because hes never gonna pay them back, he couldnt if he wanted to, he couldnt if they tried to liquidate. they are heavily incentivized to help him dump the baggies on you to close out these transactions. then he can have a fake ketamine overdose and go party with jeffjeff again.

62365104
>>62361452
elon is one of the only men actually creating value in this world.

almost the entire economy is pure pointless bullshit
>delivering sneakers to bestial niggers
>selling sloppa to bestial niggers
>keeping morbidly obese 100 year old bestial niggers alive
>manufacturing weapons so bestial niggers can shoot each other and blow shit up
>making handbags for the bestial femboons

elon is pursuing the future, the transcendence. he deserves to win.

62365105
>>62365104
They are going to deepfake it all just like nasa with kubrik except this time you paid for it by buying the ipo instead of pillaged wwii wealth

62365111
>>62365105
you are simply a low iq schizoid. you're exactly like the npcs except you're against the current thing.

62365115
>>62365111
You got mkultrad because your uncle molested you while you watched star trek or some other faggot shit and you liked it. Now spaecekeks launches make you feel cummies

62365124
>>62365115
very complex projection. must be something personal.

62365130
>>62365124
Keep fantacizing about scifi bullshit that will never happen. I hope you buy a neuralink and end up like terry schiavo

62365216
>>62365130
low iq npcs such as yourself cannot conceive of something which is not the current thing. you have my pity.

62365235
>>62361452
vibe investing.

62365240
>>62361452
it's because Musk is a cult leader

62365247
>>62361459
Literally what is "dystopian" about swarms of AI powered assassin drones?

item.title: SWIFT confirms Chainlink as the bedrock of their systems — 106 replies — 9.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
SWIFT confirms Chainlink as the bedrock of their systems

Open thread • Replies: 106 • Updated: 2026-06-14 05:21 UTC

OP

Kek fudniggers

Early replies (first 3)

62354945

https://www.icmagroup.org/assets/documents/Regulatory/Repo/ICMA-report-DLT-and-repo-part-I-June-2026-040626.pdf

62354971
it's all so tiring
i have sold much more of my stack than i wanted assuming that price would react by now

62354976
>>62354943
Cool, when will I be rich?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62360825
>>62360137
>duuuuuude it's all a consssssssthhhhpirathy!!!

there he is everyone, our very own sleuth

excuse me, DETECTIVE sleuth

nothing, and i mean NOTHING, gets by this guy. he can sniff out colluding posts in seconds. this guy is GOOD, and i feel ashamed at ever trying to get one by him

afterall, everyone knows that there's nothing more important than guarding the reputation of a dead altcoin on a dead forum


well, you know what we say here...

THE Cuckolds of crypto

62360858
>>62360802
Well, then we're fucked either way.

62360859
>>62360825
>>62360405
Jesus loves you

62360865
>>62360859
religion is the opiate of the masses
or in this case, the stink marines

62360873
>>62360865
That doesn’t change that fact that I don’t hate you and I forgive you.

62360876
>>62360873
your "forgiveness" is rejected, stinkie
how does that make you feel

62361417
>>62360876
feels to me like you're gonna take my whole cock in your ass, and you're gonna like it.

62361431
>>62354976
2030

This year was always the plan for chainlink

62361469
>>62360876
Lilla My, why do you have so much hatred for stinkies?

62361506
I thought green man sergay was going to make me rich...

62361627
>>62358895
COPE

62361699
>>62354943
7 years
7 dollars

62361781
>>62361773

62362456
it's very easy, either it works or I'll keep my stack as a lesson in humility

there is no scenario where I sell

62362461
>>62362456
cool beta attitude, stinker
just admit you lost the game of el lifio

62363300
>>62359501
>>62360137
>>62360331
Jesus is the way truth and life but link is equivalent to the money changer parasites he flipped the tables on who ultimately lose. Invest accordingly.

62363331
>>62363300
truth
jesus would rebuke all linkies
"i do not know you, stinkie"

62363473
>>62361781
CL twitter has been spamming about this shit for years now, nothing is hidden, yet the token price is still garbage

62363725
No matter who wins, the butthurt will be everlasting.
The entertainment is guaranteed

62363750
>>62363473
its effectively hidden from retail because the only thing retail understands is blatant advertising and price. link doesn't get shilled to normalfags the way shit like xrp does (ive never met a single person irl who has heard of chainlink), and nobody cares because the price has been stagnant for 5 years. its actually the perfect setup for a takeoff, though obv even me saying that will make you respond 'bearish'. cold hard truth is this is what disbelief looks like, you are demoralized and nothing will change that but radical price action.

62363975
>>62360876
https://youtu.be/kBYHwH1Vb-c?is=n6RfFklurQgYscVC

62364260
July and October, big dates to watch

62364322
Token economics is net zero as the node operators just sell for fiat
still 300 m tokens left to dump
SWIFT blockchain is a meme
The reserve is a meme
payment abstraction layer is a meme , transferring illiquid shitcoins to link to then sell link into fiat was another carrot

62364578
>"interlinking"
you can feel the cringe of the author, but chainlink begged him to include this phrase and they paid for all the catering for years, so he just powered through. what a champ

62364912
>>62356591
Just buy the ponzi goyim
I'm not buying your risk on bags of rocks.

62364932
>>62354943
>SWIFT confirms token needed
wtf really??? where?

62364935
>>62364260
What kinda retard jeet ass video is that. Chain link is a Chasity cage.

62364936

62365114
